TRE.description:
Trust Edge Record - Durable directed trust assertion for an SDN trust graph.

A TRE records one directed truster -> trustee assertion. The current trust
graph is a projection over the latest TRE records by EDGE_ID, with deleted
records acting as tombstones. Implementations must still validate the
projected graph for acyclicity before accepting it.

WEIGHT.description: Truster-assigned edge weight in the range [0, 1].

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when this edge was last updated.

DELETED.description: True when this record tombstones the edge from the current graph.

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the node/provider that issued this trust edge record.

PROVIDER_SIGNATURE.description: Provider signature over the trust edge record.
